name: reconstruction_cuda_suite_v1
purpose: Run a complete public-data, seed-42 six-dataset HD reconstruction screen; never a paper-reproduction claim.

metric_contract.horu_hd: mean_personalized_accuracy: unweighted mean over client/subject test accuracies
metric_contract.hyperfeel: mean_personalized_accuracy: unweighted mean over client/subject test accuracies
metric_contract.fedhdc: global_test_accuracy: sample-weighted accuracy of the single global prototype over concatenated client test samples

protocol.subject_selection: seeded_random over the complete valid client pool when a dataset's configured client limit excludes clients

parameter_provenance.cuda_runtime: ASSUMED_FOR_PROTOTYPE: PyTorch 2.13.0+cu130 on the execution machine
parameter_provenance.aggregate: COMMON_PRACTICE_ASSUMPTION: unweighted mean of six single-seed round-25 metrics

data_forms.uci_har: Official UCI-HAR subject split; repository feature loader.
data_forms.isolet_raw: Official ISOLET files with repository 8-client Dirichlet alpha=5 federation; not the unavailable original federated split.
data_forms.femnist: Official LEAF revision 09ec454, niid full sample split; 200 writers sampled from the full available writer pool with selection seed 42.
data_forms.wisdm: Official UCI 507 phone accelerometer, 51 users, raw xyz rows; representation is UNSPECIFIED_BY_PAPER.
data_forms.synthetic: Official LEAF example generator: 1000 tasks, 5 classes, 60 dimensions and all generation/split seeds 42.
data_forms.ninapro_db1: Official NinaPro DB1 preprocessed subject archives, 27 subjects, EMG+glove.

limitations: The original source snapshot, seed list, aggregation rule, and original execution environment are unavailable.
ISOLET federation and WISDM representation are not established as paper-matched.
This manifest must never be used to label output as a paper reproduction.
